rows.title: Andalusia's CTPDA Updates Public-Sector AI Data Protection Methodology to Cover Agentic Systems
rows.summary: CTPDA updated its public-sector AI data protection methodology specifically to cover agentic AI systems (systems that not only assist but execute actions with real effects on citizens). Built on AEPD's orientation on agentic AI. Integrated into the application available to all Andalusian public administrations. Example: an agentic social-benefits system that consults municipal census + tax + employment data and generates a draft determination.
rows.body_name: Consejo de Transparencia y Protección de Datos de Andalucía

rows.title: Andalusia's CTPDA Reports Solid Public-Sector Compliance in EDPB Coordinated Erasure-Right Action
rows.summary: CTPDA published its analysis of EDPB's 2025 Coordinated Enforcement Framework action on right-to-erasure as applied to Andalusian public sector. Findings: low volume of requests, generalised formal compliance, notable good practices in verification + citizen-facing pathways, demand for practical guides + public-sector resolution templates + data-locating tools.
rows.body_name: Consejo de Transparencia y Protección de Datos de Andalucía

rows.title: Andalusia's CTPDA Launches Methodology Tool for Responsible AI Use by Public Administrations
rows.summary: CTPDA launched a methodological tool to help Andalusian public administrations implement AI systems compliantly with GDPR + EU AI Act. Step-by-step guide adapting to project type and complexity. Graduated levels of scrutiny — simple document management vs systems making decisions about pupil curricular adaptation or identifying isolated older adults. Targeted at smaller public bodies that can't build internal compliance frameworks from scratch.
rows.body_name: Consejo de Transparencia y Protección de Datos de Andalucía
